title: 3D Scene Change Modeling With Consistent Multi-View Aggregation
summary: Change detection plays a vital role in scene monitoring, exploration, and continual reconstruction. Existing 3D change detection methods often exhibit spatial inconsistency in the detected changes and fail to explicitly separate pre- and post-change states. To address these limitations, we propose SCaR-3D, a novel 3D scene change detection framework that identifies object-level changes from a dense-view pre-change image sequence and sparse-view post-change images. Our approach consists of a signed-distance-based 2D differencing module followed by multi-view aggregation with voting and pruning, leveraging the consistent nature of 3DGS to robustly separate pre- and post-change states. We further develop a continual scene reconstruction strategy that selectively updates dynamic regions while preserving the unchanged areas. We also contribute CCS3D, a challenging synthetic dataset that allows flexible combinations of 3D change types to support controlled evaluations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves both high accuracy and efficiency, outperforming existing methods.
tldr: The paper introduces SCaR-3D, a novel framework for 3D scene change detection using multi-view aggregation and consistent 3D Gaussian Splatting, along with a new synthetic dataset, CCS3D, and claims significant performance improvements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的3D场景变化检测框架SCaR-3D，该框架使用多视图聚合和一致的3D高斯泼溅。论文还提出了一个新的合成数据集CCS3D，并声称性能有显著提高。
summary_zh: 变更检测在场景监控、探索和持续重建中扮演着至关重要的角色。现有的 3D 变更检测方法常常在检测到的变更中表现出空间不一致性，并且无法明确分离变更前和变更后的状态。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了 SCaR-3D，一种新颖的 3D 场景变更检测框架，可以从密集的变更前图像序列和稀疏的变更后图像中识别对象级别的变更。我们的方法包括一个基于有符号距离的 2D 差异模块，以及后续利用投票和剪枝进行的多视角聚合，从而利用 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 的一致性来有效地分离变更前和变更后的状态。我们进一步开发了一种持续场景重建策略，选择性地更新动态区域，同时保留未更改的区域。我们还贡献了 CCS3D，一个具有挑战性的合成数据集，允许灵活组合 3D 变更类型以支持受控评估。广泛的实验表明，我们的方法实现了高精度和高效率，优于现有方法。

title: Mesquite MoCap: Democratizing Real-Time Motion Capture with Affordable, Bodyworn IoT Sensors and WebXR SLAM
summary: Motion capture remains costly and complex to deploy, limiting use outside specialized laboratories. We present Mesquite, an open-source, low-cost inertial motion-capture system that combines a body-worn network of 15 IMU sensor nodes with a hip-worn Android smartphone for position tracking. A low-power wireless link streams quaternion orientations to a central USB dongle and a browser-based application for real-time visualization and recording. Built on modern web technologies -- WebGL for rendering, WebXR for SLAM, WebSerial and WebSockets for device and network I/O, and Progressive Web Apps for packaging -- the system runs cross-platform entirely in the browser. In benchmarks against a commercial optical system, Mesquite achieves mean joint-angle error of 2-5 degrees while operating at approximately 5% of the cost. The system sustains 30 frames per second with end-to-end latency under 15ms and a packet delivery rate of at least 99.7% in standard indoor environments. By leveraging IoT principles, edge processing, and a web-native stack, Mesquite lowers the barrier to motion capture for applications in entertainment, biomechanics, healthcare monitoring, human-computer interaction, and virtual reality. We release hardware designs, firmware, and software under an open-source license (GNU GPL).
tldr: The paper introduces Mesquite, an open-source, low-cost inertial motion capture system using wearable sensors and web technologies, achieving performance comparable to commercial systems at a fraction of the cost.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Mesquite的开源、低成本惯性运动捕捉系统，该系统使用可穿戴传感器和Web技术，以远低于商业系统的成本实现了与其相当的性能。
summary_zh: 运动捕捉部署成本高昂且复杂，限制了其在专业实验室之外的应用。我们提出 Mesquite，一个开源、低成本的惯性运动捕捉系统，它结合了一个由15个IMU传感器节点组成的体穿戴网络和一个用于位置追踪的髋部佩戴Android智能手机。一个低功耗无线链路将四元数姿态流传输到一个中央USB加密狗和一个基于浏览器的应用，用于实时可视化和记录。该系统构建于现代Web技术之上——WebGL用于渲染，WebXR用于SLAM，WebSerial和WebSockets用于设备和网络I/O，以及用于打包的渐进式Web应用——该系统完全在浏览器中跨平台运行。在与商业光学系统进行的基准测试中，Mesquite实现了平均关节角度误差为2-5度，而成本约为其5%。该系统在标准室内环境下，能以低于15毫秒的端到端延迟和至少99.7%的丢包率维持每秒30帧的速率。通过利用物联网原则、边缘处理和Web原生堆栈，Mesquite降低了娱乐、生物力学、健康监测、人机交互和虚拟现实等应用中运动捕捉的门槛。我们以开源许可（GNU GPL）发布硬件设计、固件和软件。

title: Risk-Averse Learning with Varying Risk Levels
summary: In safety-critical decision-making, the environment may evolve over time, and the learner adjusts its risk level accordingly. This work investigates risk-averse online optimization in dynamic environments with varying risk levels, employing Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as the risk measure. To capture the dynamics of the environment and risk levels, we employ the function variation metric and introduce a novel risk-level variation metric. Two information settings are considered: a first-order scenario, where the learner observes both function values and their gradients; and a zeroth-order scenario, where only function evaluations are available. For both cases, we develop risk-averse learning algorithms with a limited sampling budget and analyze their dynamic regret bounds in terms of function variation, risk-level variation, and the total number of samples. The regret analysis demonstrates the adaptability of the algorithms in non-stationary and risk-sensitive settings. Finally, numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the methods.
tldr: This paper proposes risk-averse online optimization algorithms using CVaR in dynamic environments with varying risk levels, providing dynamic regret bounds for first-order and zeroth-order information settings and demonstrating their efficacy numerically.
tldr_zh: 本文针对动态环境和变化风险水平下的风险规避在线优化问题，提出了基于条件风险价值(CVaR)的算法。该算法在具有一阶和零阶信息的环境中，针对动态遗憾界限进行了分析，并通过数值实验验证了其有效性。
summary_zh: 在安全攸关型决策中，环境可能会随时间演变，并且学习者会相应地调整其风险水平。 本文研究了在具有变化风险水平的动态环境中进行具有风险规避性的在线优化，并采用条件风险价值（CVaR）作为风险度量。 为了捕获环境和风险水平的动态性，我们采用了函数变差度量并引入了一种新的风险水平变差度量。 我们考虑了两种信息设置：一种一阶情景，学习者可以观察到函数值及其梯度；以及零阶情景，仅能进行函数评估。 对于这两种情况，我们都开发了具有有限采样预算的风险规避学习算法，并根据函数变差、风险水平变差和样本总数分析了它们的动态后悔界限。 后悔分析证明了算法在非平稳和风险敏感设置中的适应性。 最后，我们通过数值实验展示了这些方法的有效性。

title: Causal-Policy Forest for End-to-End Policy Learning
summary: This study proposes an end-to-end algorithm for policy learning in causal inference. We observe data consisting of covariates, treatment assignments, and outcomes, where only the outcome corresponding to the assigned treatment is observed. The goal of policy learning is to train a policy from the observed data, where a policy is a function that recommends an optimal treatment for each individual, to maximize the policy value. In this study, we first show that maximizing the policy value is equivalent to minimizing the mean squared error for the conditional average treatment effect (CATE) under $\{-1, 1\}$ restricted regression models. Based on this finding, we modify the causal forest, an end-to-end CATE estimation algorithm, for policy learning. We refer to our algorithm as the causal-policy forest. Our algorithm has three advantages. First, it is a simple modification of an existing, widely used CATE estimation method, therefore, it helps bridge the gap between policy learning and CATE estimation in practice. Second, while existing studies typically estimate nuisance parameters for policy learning as a separate task, our algorithm trains the policy in a more end-to-end manner. Third, as in standard decision trees and random forests, we train the models efficiently, avoiding computational intractability.
tldr: The paper introduces Causal-Policy Forest, an end-to-end algorithm for policy learning by modifying causal forests to minimize CATE error, bridging the gap between CATE estimation and policy learning with computational efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Causal-Policy Forest，一种端到端的策略学习算法，通过修改因果森林以最小化CATE误差，弥合了CATE估计和策略学习之间的差距，且计算效率高。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种用于因果推断中策略学习的端到端算法。我们观察到的数据包括协变量、处理分配和结果，其中仅观察到与分配的处理相对应的结果。策略学习的目标是从观察到的数据中训练策略，该策略是一个为每个人推荐最优处理的函数，以最大化策略价值。在本研究中，我们首先证明了最大化策略价值等价于在$\{-1, 1\}$约束回归模型下最小化条件平均处理效应(CATE)的均方误差。基于这一发现，我们修改了因果森林，一种端到端CATE估计算法，用于策略学习。我们将我们的算法称为因果策略森林。我们的算法具有三个优势。首先，它是对现有且广泛使用的CATE估计方法的简单修改，因此有助于弥合实践中策略学习和CATE估计之间的差距。其次，虽然现有的研究通常将策略学习的干扰参数估计作为一个单独的任务，但我们的算法以一种更加端到端的方式训练策略。第三，正如在标准决策树和随机森林中一样，我们高效地训练模型，避免了计算上的棘手性。

title: Long-Range Distillation: Distilling 10,000 Years of Simulated Climate into Long Timestep AI Weather Models
summary: Accurate long-range weather forecasting remains a major challenge for AI models, both because errors accumulate over autoregressive rollouts and because reanalysis datasets used for training offer a limited sample of the slow modes of climate variability underpinning predictability. Most AI weather models are autoregressive, producing short lead forecasts that must be repeatedly applied to reach subseasonal-to-seasonal (S2S) or seasonal lead times, often resulting in instability and calibration issues. Long-timestep probabilistic models that generate long-range forecasts in a single step offer an attractive alternative, but training on the 40-year reanalysis record leads to overfitting, suggesting orders of magnitude more training data are required. We introduce long-range distillation, a method that trains a long-timestep probabilistic "student" model to forecast directly at long-range using a huge synthetic training dataset generated by a short-timestep autoregressive "teacher" model. Using the Deep Learning Earth System Model (DLESyM) as the teacher, we generate over 10,000 years of simulated climate to train distilled student models for forecasting across a range of timescales. In perfect-model experiments, the distilled models outperform climatology and approach the skill of their autoregressive teacher while replacing hundreds of autoregressive steps with a single timestep. In the real world, they achieve S2S forecast skill comparable to the ECMWF ensemble forecast after ERA5 fine-tuning. The skill of our distilled models scales with increasing synthetic training data, even when that data is orders of magnitude larger than ERA5. This represents the first demonstration that AI-generated synthetic training data can be used to scale long-range forecast skill.
tldr: The paper introduces 'long-range distillation,' a method using synthetic climate data generated by a teacher model to train long-timestep AI weather models. These distilled models show improved long-range forecasting skill, even exceeding traditional methods when fine-tuned with real-world data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为“远距离蒸馏”的方法，该方法使用教师模型生成的合成气候数据来训练长时间步长的AI天气模型。 这种蒸馏模型显示出改进的长期预测能力，甚至在经过真实世界数据微调后超过了传统方法。
summary_zh: 准确的长时程天气预报对于 AI 模型而言仍然是一项主要的挑战，这既是因为误差会在自回归展开过程中累积，也因为用于训练的再分析数据集对支撑可预测性的气候变率慢模式提供了有限的样本。 大多数 AI 天气模型都是自回归的，生成短期领先时间的预报，这些预报必须重复应用才能达到次季节到季节（S2S）或季节性领先时间，这通常会导致不稳定性和校准问题。 一步式生成长时程预报的长时间步概率模型提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案，但是在 40 年的再分析记录上进行训练会导致过拟合，表明需要数量级更大的训练数据。 我们引入了长时程蒸馏，这是一种训练长时间步概率“学生”模型的方法，该方法使用短时间步自回归“教师”模型生成的巨大合成训练数据集直接预测长时程。 使用深度学习地球系统模型（DLESyM）作为教师，我们生成了超过 10,000 年的模拟气候来训练蒸馏后的学生模型，以预测各种时间尺度。 在完美模型实验中，蒸馏后的模型优于气候学基线，并接近其自回归教师模型的技能水平，同时用单步取代了数百个自回归步骤。 在现实世界中，经过 ERA5 微调后，它们实现了与欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）集合预报相当的 S2S 预报技能。 我们的蒸馏模型的技能随着合成训练数据的增加而扩展，即使该数据比 ERA5 大几个数量级。 这代表着首次证明 AI 生成的合成训练数据可用于扩展长时程预报技能。

title: PreGME: Prescribed Performance Control of Aerial Manipulators based on Variable-Gain ESO
summary:
An aerial manipulator, comprising a multirotor base and a robotic arm, is subject to significant dynamic coupling between these two components. Therefore, achieving precise and robust motion control is a challenging yet important objective. Here, we propose a novel prescribed performance motion control framework based on variable-gain extended state observers (ESOs), referred to as PreGME. The method includes variable-gain ESOs for real-time estimation of dynamic coupling and a prescribed performance flight control that incorporates error trajectory constraints. Compared with existing methods, the proposed approach exhibits the following two characteristics. First, the adopted variable-gain ESOs can accurately estimate rapidly varying dynamic coupling. This enables the proposed method to handle manipulation tasks that require aggressive motion of the robotic arm. Second, by prescribing the performance, a preset error trajectory is generated to guide the system evolution along this trajectory. This strategy allows the proposed method to ensure the tracking error remains within the prescribed performance envelope, thereby achieving high-precision control. Experiments on a real platform, including aerial staff twirling, aerial mixology, and aerial cart-pulling experiments, are conducted to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
  Experimental results demonstrate that even under the dynamic coupling caused by rapid robotic arm motion (end-effector velocity: 1.02 m/s, acceleration: 5.10 m/s$^2$), the proposed method achieves high tracking performance.
tldr: This paper introduces PreGME, a novel prescribed performance motion control framework with variable-gain extended state observers for aerial manipulators, demonstrating robust tracking performance under significant dynamic coupling in real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型的预定性能运动控制框架PreGME，该框架采用变增益扩展状态观测器用于空中机械臂，并在实际实验中展示了在显着动态耦合下的稳健跟踪性能。
summary_zh: 一种由多旋翼飞行器和机械臂组成的空中机械臂机构，其两部分之间存在显著的动态耦合。因此，实现精确且鲁棒的运动控制是一项具有挑战性但十分重要的目标。本文提出了一种基于变增益扩展状态观测器（ESO）的新型预设性能运动控制框架，称为PreGME。该方法包括用于实时估计动态耦合的变增益ESO，以及包含误差轨迹约束的预设性能飞行控制。与现有方法相比，所提出的方法具有以下两个特点。首先，所采用的变增益ESO能够准确估计快速变化的动态耦合。这使得该方法能够处理需要机械臂进行剧烈运动的操纵任务。其次，通过预设性能，生成预设误差轨迹以引导系统沿着该轨迹演化。该策略允许该方法确保跟踪误差保持在预设性能范围内，从而实现高精度控制。通过在真实平台进行的实验，包括空中棍棒旋转、空中调酒和空中拉车实验，验证了该方法的有效性。实验结果表明，即使在机器人手臂快速运动引起的动态耦合下（末端执行器速度：1.02 m/s，加速度：5.10 m/s$^2$），所提出的方法也能实现高跟踪性能。

title: Two-Robot Computational Landscape: A Complete Characterization of Model Power in Minimal Mobile Robot Systems
summary: The computational power of autonomous mobile robots under the Look-Compute-Move (LCM) model has been widely studied through an extensive hierarchy of robot models defined by the presence of memory, communication, and synchrony assumptions. While the general n-robot landscape has been largely established, the exact structure for two robots has remained unresolved. This paper presents the first complete characterization of the computational power of two autonomous robots across all major models, namely OBLOT, FSTA, FCOM, and LUMI, under the full spectrum of schedulers (FSYNCH, SSYNCH, ASYNCH, and their atomic variants). Our results reveal a landscape that fundamentally differs from the general case. Most notably, we prove that FSTA^F and LUMI^F coincide under full synchrony, a surprising collapse indicating that perfect synchrony can substitute both memory and communication when only two robots exist. We also show that FSTA and FCOM are orthogonal: there exists a problem solvable in the weakest communication model but impossible even in the strongest finite-state model, completing the bidirectional incomparability. All equivalence and separation results are derived through a novel simulation-free method, providing a unified and constructive view of the two-robot hierarchy. This yields the first complete and exact computational landscape for two robots, highlighting the intrinsic challenges of coordination at the minimal scale.
tldr: This paper provides a complete characterization of the computational power of two robots under different model assumptions (OBLOT, FSTA, FCOM, LUMI) and scheduler types (FSYNCH, etc.), revealing a landscape that differs significantly from the general n-robot case and demonstrating unexpected equivalences and separations.
tldr_zh: 本文全面描述了两个机器人在不同模型假设（OBLOT、FSTA、FCOM、LUMI）和调度器类型（FSYNCH 等）下的计算能力，揭示了一个与一般 n 机器人情况显著不同的格局，展示了意想不到的等价性和分离。
summary_zh: 在观察-计算-移动 (LCM) 模型下，自主移动机器人的计算能力已被广泛研究，通过由是否存在记忆、通信和同步假设定义的机器人模型构建了一套详尽的层级结构。虽然通用的 n 机器人图景已基本确立，但两个机器人的精确结构仍未解决。本文首次完整刻画了两个自主机器人在所有主要模型（即 OBLOT、FSTA、FCOM 和 LUMI）下，在完整调度器谱（FSYNCH、SSYNCH、ASYNCH 及其原子变体）中的计算能力。我们的结果揭示了一个与一般情况截然不同的图景。最值得注意的是，我们证明了 FSTA^F 和 LUMI^F 在完全同步下重合，这是一个令人惊讶的坍缩，表明当只有两个机器人存在时，完美的同步可以替代记忆和通信。我们还表明 FSTA 和 FCOM 是正交的：存在一个在最弱通信模型中可解的问题，但在最强的有限状态模型中也不可能解决，从而完成了双向不可比性。所有等价和分离结果都通过一种新颖的无模拟方法推导得出，从而为双机器人层级结构提供了一个统一且建设性的视角。这产生了第一个完整且精确的双机器人计算图景，突显了在最小规模下协调的内在挑战。

title: A Neural Network-Based Real-time Casing Collar Recognition System for Downhole Instruments
summary: Accurate downhole positioning is critical in oil and gas operations but is often compromised by signal degradation in traditional surface-based Casing Collar Locator (CCL) monitoring. To address this, we present an in-situ, real-time collar recognition system using embedded neural network. We introduce lightweight "Collar Recognition Nets" (CRNs) optimized for resource-constrained ARM Cortex-M7 microprocessors. By leveraging temporal and depthwise separable convolutions, our most compact model reduces computational complexity to just 8,208 MACs while maintaining an F1 score of 0.972. Hardware validation confirms an average inference latency of 343.2 μs, demonstrating that robust, autonomous signal processing is feasible within the severe power and space limitations of downhole instrumentation.
tldr: This paper presents an embedded neural network system for real-time casing collar recognition in downhole instruments, optimized for low-resource environments using compact convolutional architectures, achieving high accuracy and low latency.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于井下仪器中实时套管定位的嵌入式神经网络系统。该系统使用紧凑的卷积架构进行了优化，以适应低资源环境，实现了高精度和低延迟。
summary_zh: 精确的井下定位在油气作业中至关重要，但传统的基于地面的套管扶正器定位器(CCL)监测通常会因信号衰减而受到影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用嵌入式神经网络的井下原位、实时套管扶正器识别系统。我们引入了轻量级的“套管扶正器识别网络”(CRNs)，该网络针对资源受限的ARM Cortex-M7微处理器进行了优化。通过利用时域和深度可分离卷积，我们最紧凑的模型将计算复杂度降低到仅8,208个MAC操作，同时保持了0.972的F1得分。硬件验证确认平均推理延迟为343.2μs，这表明在井下仪器的严格功率和空间限制下，稳健的自主信号处理是可行的。

title: A Minimal Solver for Relative Pose Estimation with Unknown Focal Length from Two Affine Correspondences
summary: In this paper, we aim to estimate the relative pose and focal length between two views with known intrinsic parameters except for an unknown focal length from two affine correspondences (ACs). Cameras are commonly used in combination with inertial measurement units (IMUs) in applications such as self-driving cars, smartphones, and unmanned aerial vehicles. The vertical direction of camera views can be obtained by IMU measurements. The relative pose between two cameras is reduced from 5DOF to 3DOF. We propose a new solver to estimate the 3DOF relative pose and focal length. First, we establish constraint equations from two affine correspondences when the vertical direction is known. Then, based on the properties of the equation system with nontrivial solutions, four equations can be derived. These four equations only involve two parameters: the focal length and the relative rotation angle. Finally, the polynomial eigenvalue method is utilized to solve the problem of focal length and relative rotation angle. The proposed solver is evaluated using synthetic and real-world datasets. The results show that our solver performs better than the existing state-of-the-art solvers.
tldr: This paper presents a minimal solver for relative pose estimation and focal length calibration using only two affine correspondences and leveraging known vertical direction (e.g., from IMU data), outperforming current state-of-the-art methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种极简求解器，利用两个仿射对应关系和已知的垂直方向（例如来自IMU数据），来估计相对姿态和焦距校准，并且优于当前最先进的方法。
summary_zh: 本文旨在从两个仿射对应(ACs)中估计两个视角之间的相对姿态和焦距，两个视角的内参已知，但焦距未知。在自动驾驶汽车、智能手机和无人机等应用中，相机通常与惯性测量单元(IMU)结合使用。可以通过IMU测量获得相机视角的垂直方向。两相机之间的相对姿态从5DOF减少到3DOF。我们提出了一种新的求解器来估计3DOF相对姿态和焦距。首先，在垂直方向已知的情况下，我们从两个仿射对应建立约束方程。然后，基于具有非平凡解的方程组的性质，可以导出四个方程。这四个方程只涉及两个参数：焦距和相对旋转角。最后，利用多项式特征值方法来解决焦距和相对旋转角的问题。使用合成和真实世界数据集对所提出的求解器进行评估。结果表明，我们的求解器比现有的最先进求解器表现更好。

title: Nonlinear Dynamical Modeling of Human Intracranial Brain Activity with Flexible Inference
summary: Dynamical modeling of multisite human intracranial neural recordings is essential for developing neurotechnologies such as brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Linear dynamical models are widely used for this purpose due to their interpretability and their suitability for BCIs. In particular, these models enable flexible real-time inference, even in the presence of missing neural samples, which often occur in wireless BCIs. However, neural activity can exhibit nonlinear structure that is not captured by linear models. Furthermore, while recurrent neural network models can capture nonlinearity, their inference does not directly address handling missing observations. To address this gap, recent work introduced DFINE, a deep learning framework that integrates neural networks with linear state-space models to capture nonlinearities while enabling flexible inference. However, DFINE was developed for intracortical recordings that measure localized neuronal populations. Here we extend DFINE to modeling of multisite human intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) recordings. We find that DFINE significantly outperforms linear state-space models (LSSMs) in forecasting future neural activity. Furthermore, DFINE matches or exceeds the accuracy of a gated recurrent unit (GRU) model in neural forecasting, indicating that a linear dynamical backbone, when paired and jointly trained with nonlinear neural networks, can effectively describe the dynamics of iEEG signals while also enabling flexible inference. Additionally, DFINE handles missing observations more robustly than the baselines, demonstrating its flexible inference and utility for BCIs. Finally, DFINE's advantage over LSSM is more pronounced in high gamma spectral bands. Taken together, these findings highlight DFINE as a strong and flexible framework for modeling human iEEG dynamics, with potential applications in next-generation BCIs.
tldr: This paper extends a deep learning framework called DFINE for modeling human intracranial EEG (iEEG) data, demonstrating its superior performance over linear models and comparable accuracy to GRUs while handling missing data robustly, making it suitable for brain-computer interfaces.
tldr_zh: 本文扩展了一个名为DFINE的深度学习框架，用于建模人类颅内脑电图（iEEG）数据，证明其性能优于线性模型，并且与GRU模型具有相当的准确性，同时能够稳健地处理缺失数据，使其适用于脑机接口。
summary_zh: 对多部位人体颅内神经记录进行动态建模对于开发诸如脑机接口(BCI)等神经技术至关重要。线性动态模型因其可解释性和适用于BCI而被广泛使用。特别地，这些模型能够实现灵活的实时推理，即使在存在缺失神经样本的情况下，这在无线BCI中经常发生。然而，神经活动可能会表现出线性模型无法捕捉的非线性结构。此外，虽然循环神经网络模型可以捕捉非线性，但它们的推理并没有直接解决处理缺失观测值的问题。为了弥补这一差距，最近的研究引入了DFINE，一个深度学习框架，它将神经网络与线性状态空间模型相结合，以捕捉非线性并实现灵活的推理。然而，DFINE是为测量局部神经元群体的皮质内记录而开发的。在这里，我们将DFINE扩展到多部位人体颅内脑电图(iEEG)记录的建模。我们发现，在预测未来神经活动方面，DFINE明显优于线性状态空间模型(LSSM)。此外，DFINE在神经预测方面达到了或超过了门控循环单元(GRU)模型的准确性，表明线性动态骨干与非线性神经网络配对并联合训练时，可以有效地描述iEEG信号的动态，同时实现灵活的推理。另外，DFINE处理缺失观测值的能力比基线模型更稳健，证明了其灵活的推理能力和在BCI中的实用性。最后，DFINE相对于LSSM的优势在高伽马频谱频段中更为明显。总而言之，这些发现突显了DFINE作为一个强大而灵活的框架，用于建模人体iEEG动态，并在下一代BCI中具有潜在的应用。
